name: Baked Tomatoes#!
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and cut off the tops of tomatoes.
2. Cut out the insides of the tomatoes and dice them.
3. Sprinkle diced tomatoes with salt and pepper.
4. Heat butter in a pan, sauté onion and bell pepper until tender.
5. Add diced tomatoes, cooked rice, beaten egg, oregano, ground basil, additional salt, grated cheese, and crumbled bacon to the butter mixture.
6. Stuff prepared tomatoes with the mixture.
7. Place tomatoes in a shallow baking pan with about 1/2 cup water.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes. Makes six servings.
